title: Unsupported: little endian ordering for arrays

features.name: packed struct with little-endian array member
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a little-endian packed array as a member field, where the array has ascending range [0:N]
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [9:0] a; } t1;
typedef struct packed { logic [6:0] b; t1 [0:4] c; logic d; } t2;

features.name: access to little-endian packed array element
features.description: Code should include accessing an element of a little-endian packed array inside a struct, where index 0 is at the high bits due to little-endian ordering
